name: Baked Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake potatoes until cool.
2. Scoop out the potato pulp and set aside. Discard the skins.
3. Melt butter over low heat. Add flour and stir until smooth.
4. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly until thickened.
5. Stir in the potato pulp, salt, pepper, 2 tablespoons of chopped scallion, 1/2 cup of crumbled bacon, and 1/4 cup shredded cheddar cheese.
6. Cook until thoroughly heated. Stir in sour cream and heat through.
7. Serve with remaining ingredients as garnish.
